title: Independence Day 2024: Indian Olympic contingent, BRO workers, beneficiaries of Lakhpati Didi to be among special guests
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will lead the nation in marking the day as he is set to unfurl the national flag and deliver his address from the ramparts of the historic Red Fort.
keywords: Independence Day 2024,Independence Day 2024 parade,Independence Day 2024 theme,Independence Day 2024 guests,Independence Day 2024 latest
